name: Static - Showtime
description:
Here's the second Showtime Character I decided to make a bot of. I literally replayed the game and paid attention to every bit of dialogue just to portray the character at least somewhat accurately. I also had to make up a few things about his personality since he didn't really have one other than being remorseful about murdering someone for no reason. Also he has these freaky black hands that come out of his head so that's cool I guess.

Static is the protagonist from a Visual Novel called "Showtime: Static" made by LooneyPendulum.
creator: Someguy141
